# Version 4.151.0 (Unreleased)
> **CPU raster regression fix**

## Highlights

Restores SK_ENABLE_LEGACY_SHADERCONTEXT to fix a CPU raster rendering regression introduced in Preview 2.

## Breaking Changes

*None in this preview line.*

## Bug Fixes

- **CPU raster regression resolved** — Restores the SK_ENABLE_LEGACY_SHADERCONTEXT flag that was dropped during the m151 engine update, correcting rendering regressions on CPU raster backends. ([#4428](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4428))
